summary: Backend API testing completed for Hönsgården app iteration 15. All 26 tests passed. Verified: new /api/statistics/trend-analysis endpoint with complete response structure (period comparison, changes, overall_trend, trend_message, insights), /api/statistics/advanced-insights endpoint (metrics and insights), /api/premium-page with token handling, auth registration endpoints with validation, password reset endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ NEW /api/statistics/trend-analysis returns correct response structure with all required fields
✓ Trend-analysis includes: period (current/previous with start, end, days), hen_count, current_period, previous_period, changes, overall_trend, trend_message, insights
✓ Changes structure contains: eggs, laying_rate, costs, sales, profit - each with value and unit

✓ /api/statistics/advanced-insights returns metrics (feed_conversion_ratio, laying_rate, cost_per_egg, revenue_per_egg, profit_per_egg, feed_cost_per_egg, eggs_per_hen_monthly, eggs_per_hen_yearly_estimate) and insights (best_laying_day, productivity_score)
✓ /api/premium-page returns HTML with checkout functionality and proper auth token handling
✓ Auth registration endpoints validate: name required, terms acceptance, password length (min 6 chars)
✓ Password reset endpoints: /api/auth/forgot-password returns code_sent flag, /api/auth/reset-password-with-code validates inputs
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API fully tested. New /api/statistics/trend-analysis endpoint verified with correct structure. All endpoints working correctly. Trend analysis compares 30-day periods (current vs previous), calculates changes in eggs, laying_rate, costs, sales, profit, and provides overall_trend ('improving'/'declining'/'stable') with trend_message in Swedish. Frontend statistics.tsx already has the TrendAnalysis interface matching the backend response structure.

trend_analysis: Response includes: period (current/previous), hen_count, current_period, previous_period
Changes: eggs, laying_rate, costs, sales, profit (each with value and unit)
advanced_insights: Metrics: feed_conversion_ratio, laying_rate, cost_per_egg, revenue_per_egg, profit_per_egg, feed_cost_per_egg, eggs_per_hen_monthly, eggs_per_hen_yearly_estimate
premium_page: Includes auth token handling for authenticated checkout
auth_registration: POST /api/auth/register - Validates name, terms, password length
password_reset: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - Returns 200 with message and code_sent flag
POST /api/auth/reset-password-with-code - Validates token and password length
